---
title: "FAMetAdatoma"
author: "Maribel Alcoriza"
date: "2026-03-16"
output: html_document
params:
    input_table: "test.csv"
    correct13C: TRUE
    resolution: 140000
    purity13C: 0.99
    runelongation: TRUE
    maxiterelo: 10000
    rundesaturation: TRUE
---


```{r}
library(FAMetA)
#==============================================================================#
# Read fadata
#==============================================================================#
fadata <- readfadatafile(params$input_table)
fadata$metadata$sampletype <- tolower((fadata$metadata$sampletype))

#==============================================================================#
# Data correction
#==============================================================================#
fadata <- dataCorrection(fadata, correct13C = params$correct13C, 
                         resolution = params$resolution, purity13C = params$purity13C,
                         blankgroup = "blank", 
                         externalnormalization = c())

#==============================================================================#
# Metabolic analysis
#==============================================================================#
###################
# Synthesis analysis

if ("D1" %in% colnames(fadata$metadata)){D1 <- as.numeric(fadata$metadata$D1)}else{D1<-NA}
if ("D2" %in% colnames(fadata$metadata)){D2 <- as.numeric(fadata$metadata$D2)}else{D2<-NA}
if ("P" %in% colnames(fadata$metadata)){P <- as.numeric(fadata$metadata$P)}else{P<-NA}

fadata <- synthesisAnalysis(fadata = fadata, R2Thr = 0.95, 
                            maxiter = 1000,
                            maxconvergence = 100, 
                            startpoints = 5,
                            D1 = D1, D2 = D2, P = P, propagateD = TRUE)


###################
# Elongation analysis

if (params$runelongation){
  fadata <- elongationAnalysis(fadata = fadata, 
                               R2Thr = 0.95, 
                               maxiter = params$maxiterelo,
                               maxconvergence = 100, 
                               startpoints = 5, 
                               D2Thr = 0.1)
}

###################
# Desaturation analysis

if (params$rundesaturation){
  fadata <- desaturationAnalysis(fadata = fadata,
                                 SEThr = 0.05)
}


###################
# Summarize results
fadata <- summarizeResults(fadata = fadata, 
                           controlgroup = "control13cglc")



#==============================================================================#
# Save results
#==============================================================================#

saveRDS(fadata, file="/app/Output/fadata.rds")

#==============================================================================#
# Outputs
#==============================================================================#
write.csv(fadata$results$results, file = "/app/Output/results.csv", row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(fadata$results$summary, file = "/app/Output/summary.csv")

write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                  colnames(fadata$mid),
                  fadata$mid),
            file = "/app/Output/mid.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)

if ("elongation" %in% names(fadata)){
  write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                    colnames(fadata$synthesis$predictedValues),
                    fadata$synthesis$predictedValues,
                    fadata$elongation$predictedValues),
              file = "/app/Output/predictedmid.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)
} else {
  write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                    colnames(fadata$synthesis$predictedValues),
                    fadata$synthesis$predictedValues),
              file = "/app/Output/predictedmid.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)
}


pdf("/app/Output/relativepoolsizeRaw.pdf", 
    height = 10+length(unique(fadata$fattyacids$Compound))*0.01)
print(fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize$raw$plot)
dev.off()

write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                  colnames(fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize$raw$values),
                  fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize$raw$values),
            file = "/app/Output/relativepoolsizeRaw.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)


pdf("/app/Output/relativepoolsizeZscore.pdf", 
    height = 10+length(unique(fadata$fattyacids$Compound))*0.01)
print(fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize$zscore$plot)
dev.off()

write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                  colnames(fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize$raw$values),
                  fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize$zscore$values),
            file = "/app/Output/relativepoolsizeZscore.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)

if ("log2FC" %in% names(fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize)){
  pdf("/app/Output/relativepoolsizeLog2FC.pdf", 
      height = 10+length(unique(fadata$fattyacids$Compound))*0.01)
  print(fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize$log2FC$plot)
  dev.off()
  
  write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                    colnames(fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize$log2FC$values),
                    fadata$results$heatmaps$relativepoolsize$log2FC$values),
              file = "/app/Output/relativepoolsizeLog2FC.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)
}

pdf("/app/Output/resultsRaw_endogenouslySynthesized.pdf", 
    height = 10+length(unique(fadata$fattyacids$Compound))*0.01)
print(fadata$results$heatmaps$synthesized$raw$plot)
dev.off()

write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                  colnames(fadata$results$heatmaps$synthesized$raw$values),
                  fadata$results$heatmaps$synthesized$raw$values),
            file = "/app/Output/resultsRaw_endogenouslySynthesized.csv", sep=",", 
            col.names = FALSE)


if ("log2FC" %in% names(fadata$results$heatmaps$synthesized)){
  pdf("/app/Output/resultsLog2FC_endogenouslySynthesized.pdf", 
      height = 10+length(unique(fadata$fattyacids$Compound))*0.01)
  print(fadata$results$heatmaps$synthesized$log2FC$plot)
dev.off()
  
write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                  colnames(fadata$results$heatmaps$synthesized$log2FC$values),
                    fadata$results$heatmaps$synthesized$log2FC$values),
              file = "/app/Output/resultsLog2FC_endogenouslySynthesized.csv", sep=",", 
              col.names = FALSE)
}


###################
# Synthesis analysis

pdf("/app/Output/plotsSynthesis.pdf")
for (f in 1:length(fadata$synthesis$plots)){
  for (s in 1:length(fadata$synthesis$plots[[f]])){
    print(fadata$synthesis$plots[[f]][[s]])
  }
}
dev.off()

write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                  colnames(fadata$results$allparameters$S16),
                  fadata$results$allparameters$S16),
            file = "/app/Output/S16.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)

###################
# Elongation analysis

if ("elongation" %in% names(fadata)){
  pdf("/app/Output/plotsElongation.pdf")
  for (f in 1:length(fadata$elongation$plots)){
    for (s in 1:length(fadata$elongation$plots[[f]])){
      print(fadata$elongation$plots[[f]][[s]])
    }
  }
  dev.off()
  
  write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                    colnames(fadata$results$allparameters$E1),
                    fadata$results$allparameters$E1),
              file = "/app/Output/E1.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)
  write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                    colnames(fadata$results$allparameters$E2),
                    fadata$results$allparameters$E2),
              file = "/app/Output/E2.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)
  write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                    colnames(fadata$results$allparameters$E3),
                    fadata$results$allparameters$E3),
              file = "/app/Output/E3.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)
  write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                    colnames(fadata$results$allparameters$E4),
                    fadata$results$allparameters$E4),
              file = "/app/Output/E4.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)
  write.table(rbind(fadata$metadata$sampletype, 
                    colnames(fadata$results$allparameters$E5),
                    fadata$results$allparameters$E5),
              file = "/app/Output/E5.csv", sep=",", col.names = FALSE)
}
```
